title: Data models: Bus, Route, BusStop, Schedule

subtasks.title: BusStop schema
subtasks.description: name, location {type: Point, coordinates}, with 2dsphere index for geo queries.

subtasks.title: Route schema
subtasks.description: name, stops: [ObjectId ref BusStop] (ordered array), distance, estimatedDuration.

subtasks.title: Bus schema
subtasks.description: busNumber, capacity, routeId (ref Route), driverId (ref User), status (active/disabled/maintenance), currentLocation.
